text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: delphij
Date: Fri May 22 07:04:29 UTC 2015

Log:
  Pass full path to the vuln.xml file to extra-validation.py.  Without this,
  if .OBJDIR differs from .CURDIR, the validation would fail.

  PR:		193923
  Reported by:	jbeich
